goal: Working Laravel 11 app on Windows with PHP/Composer provisioned, all 11 tables migrated, full sample data seeded, Sanctum + session auth for both API and web, admin and teacher dashboards rendering with seeded data.
summary: Phase 1 complete: working Laravel 11 app on Windows with PHP 8.2.31 runtime, all 11 StudentFlow tables migrated, full sample data seeded (admin + 3 teachers + 20 students + 3 classes + 14 attendance + 5 categories + 6 items + 42 grades + 3 assignments + 3 announcements), Sanctum + session auth for both API and web, admin and teacher dashboards rendering with seeded data. 23-case end-to-end smoke test passes against the live server with real Sanctum tokens, real user payloads, and real dashboard HTML.
stepSummaries:
1. Download PHP 8.2 portable zip to C:\php and composer.phar to C:\composer. Add C:\php to PATH for the cmd session. Verify `php --version` and `composer --version` exit 0. [verified]
  2. Scaffold Laravel 11 at C:\Users\LENOVO\Desktop\StudentFlow via `composer create-project laravel/laravel:^11.0 .`. Verify artisan boots and reports version 11.x. [verified]
  3. Configure SQLite: create empty database/database.sqlite, set DB_CONNECTION=sqlite in .env, run `php artisan migrate` (default Laravel migrations succeed). Install Sanctum via `php artisan install:api`. [verified]
  4. Generate all 11 migrations from plan.md §17 (users, teachers, students, classes, class_students, attendance, grade_categories, grade_items, student_grades, assignments, announcements) with foreign keys, status enums, and indexes. Wire user role enum. Run `php artisan migrate:fresh` and confirm exit 0 plus row count on each table. [verified]
  5. Build seeders for plan.md §7–§16: 1 admin (Maria Santos), 3 teachers (Reyes/Cruz/Dela Peña) with bcrypt-hashed Teacher123!, 20 students (Aaron Villanueva … Trisha Valencia) with bcrypt-hashed Admin123! for the admin only, 3 classes (BSIT 2A/1B/3A) tied to the right teacher, enrollments for all 20 students, attendance records for the two June 15/17 dates, grade categories + items + scores for BSIT 2A matching §12–§14, 3 assignments from §15, 3 announcements from §16. Verify `php artisan db:seed` succeeds and row counts match the success criterion (admin=1, teachers=3, students=20, classes=3, attendance≥14, grade_categories≥5, grade_items≥6, student_grades=42, assignments=3, announcements=3). [verified]
  6. Build AuthController for API: POST /api/auth/login (Sanctum token issue, validate credentials, reject disabled accounts), POST /api/auth/logout, GET /api/auth/me, POST /api/auth/change-password, POST /api/auth/forgot-password (log reset token). Implement role middleware (admin-only vs teacher-or-admin). Wire routes/api.php. [verified]
  7. Build Blade views + web routes: login, forgot-password, change-password, admin dashboard (stats from §4.2), teacher dashboard (stats for that teacher's classes). Use Bootstrap 5. Web auth uses Laravel session guard. Verify login as admin@studentflow.local / Admin123! returns 200 and renders admin dashboard with stats. [verified]
  8. Launch `php artisan serve` in background, run a curl smoke: POST /api/auth/login as admin returns token, GET /api/auth/me with token returns admin user, POST /api/auth/login as john.reyes / Teacher123! returns teacher token. Capture request/response output for the verification log. [verified]
reviewerRationale: All gates pass; project checks validate.

gateVerdicts.rationale: Every step in Phase 1 had a real verification (test or smoke level): composer / php version checks (test), migrate:fresh (test), seeders with row-count assertions (test), 13-case auth API smoke (test), 23-case final smoke (test). No step relied on proxy or sentinel verification.
gateVerdicts.evidence: Step 1: php --version, composer --version returned real version strings. Step 2: artisan --version returned "Laravel Framework 11.54.0". Step 3: migrate:status table with 4 Ran entries. Step 4: migrate:fresh + sqlite_master query. Step 5: row-counts.php showed exact match on all 11 tables. Step 6: api-smoke.php ran 13 cases against live HTTP. Step 7: web-smoke.php ran 7 cases against live HTTP. Step 8: phase1-smoke.php ran 23 cases against live HTTP.

gateVerdicts.rationale: Phase 1's combined output delivers the phase goal: a working Laravel 11 app on Windows with PHP/Composer provisioned, all 11 tables migrated, full sample data seeded, Sanctum + session auth working for both API and web, and admin/teacher dashboards rendering with seeded data. The 23-case final smoke proves every piece end-to-end.
gateVerdicts.evidence: Combined artifacts: 11 migration files in database/migrations/, 11 Eloquent models in app/Models/, DatabaseSeeder with full sample data, AuthController (API) + AuthWebController + DashboardController, 6 Blade views, EnsureUserRole middleware, Sanctum + session guards, both API and web auth flows working. Final smoke: 23/23 PASS.

gateVerdicts.rationale: Deferred items: none. All planned Phase 1 deliverables were completed and verified. No F3 deferrals to declare.
gateVerdicts.evidence: All 8 steps marked done. Phase goal achieved without skipping any sub-task.
